creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I should mention this: 


% pkg rquery -r FreeBSD %v fontconfig
2.13.93_1,1
% pkg lock -l
Currently locked packages:
fontconfig-2.13.93,1
% date ; uname -KUv
Sun 18 Jul 2021 11:30:45 BST
FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #100 main-n247798-f39dd6a9784: Thu Jul  8 07:38:23 BST 2021     root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG  1400025 1400025
% 


– the lock of fontconfig is to work around ugly bug 257087 …
